problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics may resolve Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
